name: Eggnog Logs
recipeIngredient: 1 Cup Pecans, toasted and finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl with an electric mixer set to medium speed, beat the sugar and Crisco until well blended.
2. Add the eggs, corn syrup, vanilla, and rum extract; beat until well blended and fluffy.
3. In a medium bowl, combine the flour, nutmeg, baking soda, and salt.
4. Gradually add the flour mixture to the Crisco mixture with the mixer on low speed, beating until well blended.
5. Form the dough into a ball and wrap in plastic wrap; refrigerate for several hours or overnight.
6. Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
7. Divide the dough into 10 pieces. Roll each piece into a 15-inch rope.
8. Cut each rope into five 3-inch logs.
9. Place the logs about 2 inches apart on ungreased cookie sheets.
10. Bake for 7 to 9 minutes, or until just lightly browned.
11. Cool the cookies for 2 minutes on the baking sheet before transferring them to a wire rack to cool completely.
12. Meanwhile, prepare the icing: In a small bowl, combine the powdered sugar and 3 tablespoons water; stir until smooth.
13. Dip both ends of each cookie log into the icing, then roll in the chopped pecans.
